_comment: Curated US data-broker / people-search opt-out registry. Tokens in URLs: {name}, {name_slug}, {first}, {last}, {city}, {state}, {email}, {phone}. Difficulty: easy=web form, medium=email/verify, hard=ID/notarized. Order roughly by exposure impact.

brokers.name: TruePeopleSearch
brokers.notes: One of the most exposed free lookups. Find your record, copy its URL, submit on removal page. No account.

brokers.name: FastPeopleSearch
brokers.notes: Shows full address history + relatives + phones for free. Locate record, submit URL on removal page.

brokers.name: Spokeo
brokers.notes: Search name, copy the profile URL, paste into opt-out + email. Confirmation email required.

brokers.name: Whitepages
brokers.notes: Requires phone-call verification code to complete suppression. Widely scraped source.

brokers.name: BeenVerified
brokers.notes: Search your name on the opt-out page directly, select record, verify by email.

brokers.name: Radaris
brokers.notes: Find profile, click 'Control Information', verify by phone/email. Known to repopulate — recheck quarterly.

brokers.name: MyLife
brokers.notes: Publishes 'reputation scores'. Opt-out via CCPA form; may require calling 888-704-1900. Persistent.

brokers.name: Intelius
brokers.notes: PeopleConnect network (also covers TruthFinder/Instant Checkmate). Email verification.

brokers.name: TruthFinder
brokers.notes: PeopleConnect. Find record, confirm by email.

brokers.name: Instant Checkmate
brokers.notes: PeopleConnect. Email confirmation.

brokers.name: PeopleFinders
brokers.notes: Locate record, submit removal, confirm by email.

brokers.name: PeekYou
brokers.notes: Aggregates social profiles + usernames. Needs the URL of your listing.

brokers.name: That's Them
brokers.notes: Exposes email + phone + IP linkage. Simple form.

brokers.name: Nuwber
brokers.notes: Find record, paste its URL, verify by email.

brokers.name: USPhoneBook
brokers.notes: Reverse-phone exposure. Locate record, submit, email confirm.

brokers.name: Advanced Background Checks
brokers.notes: Free full report. Locate record, submit URL, email confirm.

brokers.name: SearchPeopleFree
brokers.notes: Simple removal form + email confirm.

brokers.name: ClustrMaps
brokers.notes: Maps your address history publicly. Enter address on opt-out page.

brokers.name: US Search
brokers.notes: PeopleConnect network. Email confirm.

brokers.name: 411.com
brokers.notes: Whitepages-owned. Same phone-verify flow as Whitepages.

brokers.name: Acxiom
brokers.notes: Wholesale marketing-data broker (feeds many others). Opt-out form suppresses future selling.

brokers.name: LexisNexis
brokers.notes: Feeds background/insurance/law-enforcement. Suppression needs ID; strongest privacy win of the list.

brokers.name: Epsilon
brokers.notes: Major marketing-data broker. Email optout@epsilon.com or use the DNC form.

brokers.name: Oracle Data Cloud
brokers.notes: Ad-targeting profile opt-out (BlueKai lineage).

brokers.name: Have I Been Pwned
brokers.notes: Not a removal — check which breaches leaked your email, then rotate those passwords + enable 2FA. Auto-checked below via HudsonRock stealer-log lookup too.
